summary: Patricia Reyes. Project: residential_in_development in San José del Cabo, BCS — fraccionamiento privado. Key program: 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, pool, solar, smart home — 337 sqm total. Site: 1,200 sqm lot, slight slope, no hydrology concerns. Budget signal: USD 400,000–700,000. Design engagement: design-engaged client profile; project in a gated community (Residencial Vista del Mar) with strict construction covenants (contemporary style, natural stone/stucco, 7m height limit).
